name: theo-build-these
description: Prototypes inspired by Theo's 'I don't have time to build these things' video.

scripts.demo:weird-bench: node packages/weird-bench/bin/weird-bench.js packages/weird-bench/fixtures/reverse-string -- node -e "process.stdin.resume(); process.stdin.on('end', () => console.log('.reggib sdliub xileF'))"
scripts.demo:all: npm run demo:safe-npx && npm run demo:source-vault && npm run demo:dev-sync && npm run demo:mobile-lab && npm run demo:agent-workspace && npm run demo:weird-bench
